Client.title: Client
Client.description: Represents a client for whom budgets are created.

contactEmail.description: Email address of the client for contact purposes.

contactPhone.description: Phone number of the client for contact purposes.

notes.description: Any additional notes or information about the client.

Budget.title: Budget
Budget.description: Represents a budget created for a client.

clientId.description: Reference to the Client entity. (Relationship: Client 1:N Budget)

taskDescription.description: Description of the task to be performed.

startDate.description: Start date of the work period.

endDate.description: End date of the work period.

deadline.description: End date of the work period.

dailyRateId.description: Reference to the DailyRate entity. (Relationship: DailyRate 1:N Budget)

totalAmount.description: Total amount of the budget, calculated automatically.

status.description: Status of the budget (e.g., active, completed, canceled).

notes.description: Additional notes or comments related to the budget.

DailyRate.title: DailyRate
DailyRate.description: Represents the configuration for a daily rate.

id.description: Unique identifier for the daily rate configuration.

startTime.description: Start time of the daily work period.

endTime.description: End time of the daily work period.

totalHours.description: Total working hours per day, including breaks.

dailyValue.description: Monetary value of the daily rate.

description.description: Short description of the daily rate configuration.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores public information about a user.

/users/{userId}/clients/{clientId}.description: Sub-collection for clients owned by a specific user.

/users/{userId}/budgets/{budgetId}.description: Sub-collection for budgets owned by a specific user.

/users/{userId}/dailyRates/{dailyRateId}.description: Sub-collection for daily rates owned by a specific user.
